root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as principal_balance, count(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) as count_contract, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as sysdate_tdate ,( case sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code when '01' then 'ฉุกเฉิน' when '02' then 'สามัญ' else 'พิเศษ' end ) as group_code_des
,( select count(sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock <> 0) and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no < '70000') and (member_status_code = '0') ) as count_mem_share_normal
,( select count(sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock <> 0) and (member_status_code = '0') and (mem_type ='02') ) as count_mem_share_spec
,( select count(sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock <> 0) and (member_status_code = '0') ) as count_mem_share
,( select count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no >= '90000') and (member_status_code = '0') ) as count_mem_share_coll
,( select sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and (member_status_code = '0') and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no < '70000') ) as sumshare_mem_code_0_normal
,( select sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and (member_status_code = '0') and (mem_type ='02' ) ) as sumshare_mem_code_0_spec
,( select sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered Where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0') and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no not in ('a8000', 'a8100')) ) as sumshare_mem_code_0
FROM sc_cls_confirm_data, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered
WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type ) and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' )
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = to_date('2024-8-31 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group
ORDER BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code ASC, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group ASC, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ASC
